name: @proud-flow/api
description: Proud Flow Cloudflare API workspace placeholder

scripts.deploy:dev: pnpm build && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env dev
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm build && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env production
scripts.db:migrate:dev: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply proud-flow-dev --config wrangler.jsonc --env dev --remote
scripts.db:migrate:prod: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply proud-flow-prod --config wrangler.jsonc --env production --remote
scripts.wrangler:check: pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env dev --dry-run
